name: agenda-smart
description: Agenda local con vistas diaria/semanal/mensual, notificaciones y empaquetado Electron.

scripts.build:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.build:android:release: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease bundleRelease
scripts.build:android:release:signed: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat clean assembleRelease bundleRelease
scripts.build:android:apk:release: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.build:android:aab:release: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
